title: Bitter Flaky Chinese Tomato Crumble
description: A romantic and comforting Shandong dish featuring a blend of tomatoes with a touch of bitterness, cooked to perfection in a pressure cooker for added texture and flavor.

ingredients.name: bitter tomatoes
ingredients.notes: preferably local, for flavor and texture

ingredients.name: celery stalks
ingredients.notes: optional for extra crunch and nutrition

instructions: Wash all vegetables thoroughly. Cut the tomatoes into quarters, onion in half, and garlic cloves in half.
Heat oil in a pressure cooker over medium heat, add onions and celery (if using) followed by garlic. Sauté until translucent, about 2 minutes.
Add bitter tomatoes to the pot with passata, low-sodium soy sauce, salt to taste, and sauté for another minute to allow flavors to meld together.
Seal the pressure cooker and cook on high pressure for 5-6 minutes. Release steam naturally, then quick release any remaining pressure carefully. Stir in celery if using before serving.
Serve hot as a side dish or alongside your favorite main courses. Garnish with fresh herbs like cilantro to enhance its appeal.
